synopsis: General Rieekan learns from Rebel spies that the Galactic Empire is constructing a new superweapon known as the *Tarkin*. Recognizing the danger, he sends the survivors of the original Death Star, Luke Skywalker, Leia Organa, Chewbacca, and the droids C-3PO and R2-D2, to the planet Hockaleg in the Patriim system to infiltrate an Imperial construction crew and get aboard the *Tarkin*. Darth Vader observes the Rebels' arrival and sets a trap to finally capture Luke, unaware that some of his own officers are secretly plotting against him in retaliation for the brutal punishments he has inflicted on their fellow Imperials.
title: Star Wars (1977) #51: Resurrection of Evil
